Submodules

news.admin module

news/admin.py

Admin registrations for news models.

class news.admin.ArticleAdmin(model, admin_site)[source]

Bases: ModelAdmin

autocomplete_fields = ('author', 'publisher', 'approved_by')
list_display = ('title', 'author', 'publisher', 'approved', 'created_at')
list_filter = ('approved', 'publisher', 'created_at')
property media
search_fields = ('title', 'content')
class news.admin.JournalistSubscriptionAdmin(model, admin_site)[source]

Bases: ModelAdmin

autocomplete_fields = ('reader', 'journalist')
list_display = ('reader', 'journalist', 'created_at')
list_filter = ('journalist',)
property media
search_fields = ('reader__username', 'reader__email', 'journalist__username', 'journalist__email')
class news.admin.NewsletterAdmin(model, admin_site)[source]

Bases: ModelAdmin

autocomplete_fields = ('author',)
filter_horizontal = ('articles',)
list_display = ('title', 'author', 'created_at')
property media
search_fields = ('title', 'description')
class news.admin.PublisherAdmin(model, admin_site)[source]

Bases: ModelAdmin

list_display = ('name', 'created_at')
property media
search_fields = ('name',)
class news.admin.PublisherMembershipAdmin(model, admin_site)[source]

Bases: ModelAdmin

autocomplete_fields = ('publisher', 'user')
list_display = ('publisher', 'user', 'member_role')
list_filter = ('member_role', 'publisher')
property media
search_fields = ('publisher__name', 'user__username', 'user__email')
class news.admin.PublisherSubscriptionAdmin(model, admin_site)[source]

Bases: ModelAdmin

autocomplete_fields = ('reader', 'publisher')
list_display = ('reader', 'publisher', 'created_at')
list_filter = ('publisher',)
property media
search_fields = ('reader__username', 'reader__email', 'publisher__name')

news.models module

Database models for the Capstone News project.

This module defines publishers, publisher memberships, articles, and newsletters.

class news.models.Article(*args, **kwargs)[source]

Bases: Model

Article content written by a Journalist.

An article can be: - independent (publisher is null) - publisher content (publisher is set)

exception DoesNotExist

Bases: ObjectDoesNotExist

exception MultipleObjectsReturned

Bases: MultipleObjectsReturned

exception NotUpdated

Bases: ObjectNotUpdated, DatabaseError

approved

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

approved_at

A wrapper for a deferred-loading field. When the value is read from this object the first time, the query is executed.

approved_by

Accessor to the related object on the forward side of a many-to-one or one-to-one (via ForwardOneToOneDescriptor subclass) relation.

In the example:

class Child(Model):
    parent = ForeignKey(Parent, related_name='children')

Child.parent is a ForwardManyToOneDescriptor instance.

Accessor to the related object on the forward side of a many-to-one or one-to-one (via ForwardOneToOneDescriptor subclass) relation.

In the example:

class Child(Model):
    parent = ForeignKey(Parent, related_name='children')

newsletters

Accessor to the related objects manager on the forward and reverse sides of a many-to-many relation.

In the example:

class Pizza(Model):
    toppings = ManyToManyField(Topping, related_name='pizzas')

Pizza.toppings and Topping.pizzas are ManyToManyDescriptor instances.

Most of the implementation is delegated to a dynamically defined manager class built by create_forward_many_to_many_manager() defined below.

objects = <django.db.models.manager.Manager object>

Hook for doing any extra model-wide validation after clean() has been called on every field by self.clean_fields. Any ValidationError raised by this method will not be associated with a particular field; it will have a special-case association with the field defined by NON_FIELD_ERRORS.

class news.models.Publisher(*args, **kwargs)[source]

Bases: Model

Represents a publisher. Editors and Journalists are linked via PublisherMembership.

class news.models.PublisherMembership(*args, **kwargs)[source]

Bases: Model

Links a user to a publisher with a membership type (Editor or Journalist).

This avoids circular migration dependencies between accounts and news.

exception DoesNotExist

Bases: ObjectDoesNotExist

MEMBER_EDITOR = 'Editor'
MEMBER_JOURNALIST = 'Journalist'
MEMBER_ROLE_CHOICES = (('Editor', 'Editor'), ('Journalist', 'Journalist'))
exception MultipleObjectsReturned

Bases: MultipleObjectsReturned

exception NotUpdated

Bases: ObjectNotUpdated, DatabaseError

news.services module

news.services.send_article_approved_email_to_subscribers(article: Article) → int[source]

Send article approval notification emails to subscribed readers.

Returns:

number of emails attempted/sent (one send_mail call per

recipient).

Return type:

int

news.urls module

news.views module

Views for the main news application.

This module handles article browsing, article approval, journalist article management, publisher management, and reader subscription actions in the web interface.

news.views.approval_queue(request)[source]

Editor-only page: show articles waiting for approval (approved=False).

news.views.approve_article(request, pk)[source]

Editor action: approve a pending article (POST only).

news.views.article_detail(request, pk)[source]

Detail page: - Approved articles can be viewed by anyone logged in - Unapproved articles can be viewed by editors - Unapproved articles can also be viewed by their journalist owner - Readers can subscribe to the article’s journalist/publisher

news.views.article_list(request)[source]

Main page: show ONLY approved articles.

news.views.create_article(request)[source]

Journalists submit new articles here.

Important: - author is always the logged-in user (set BEFORE validation) - approved is forced to False so editors must approve in /queue/

news.views.create_publisher(request)[source]

Editor-only page to create a new publisher.

news.views.edit_article(request, pk)[source]

Journalist-only page to edit their own article.

Rules: - only the author can edit - journalists can edit their own pending or approved articles - after editing, article becomes pending again and requires editor approval

news.views.my_articles(request)[source]

Journalist-only page showing all articles created by the logged-in journalist, including pending ones.

news.views.publisher_list(request)[source]

Editor-only page showing all publishers.

news.views.reject_article(request, pk)[source]

Editor action: reject an article (POST only).

Simple approach: delete it. (Later we can change this to ‘rejected’ status instead of delete.)

news.views.subscribe_journalist_from_article(request, pk)[source]

Reader-only action: subscribe to the article author’s updates. POST only.

news.views.subscribe_publisher_from_article(request, pk)[source]

Reader-only action: subscribe to the article’s publisher updates. POST only.

news.views.unsubscribe_journalist_from_article(request, pk)[source]

Reader-only action: unsubscribe from the article author’s updates. POST only.

news.views.unsubscribe_publisher_from_article(request, pk)[source]

Reader-only action: unsubscribe from the article’s publisher updates. POST only.

Module contents
